title: They Made $0 for 4 Years. Then Built a $22B Startup | The Kalshi Story
summary: Kalshi, founded by Tarek Mansour and Luana Lopes Lara, built a regulated financial exchange for prediction markets on real-world events. The startup spent four years navigating regulatory obstacles, including litigation against its regulator, before achieving profitability and scaling to millions of customers and a $22 billion valuation. The video highlights the founders' conviction and the transition from a market-based approach versus casino-like speculation.
